/CAL:MISD REST REPORT/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO VICTIM'S DAVID BALABAN, CALTRANS AND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER ALL RESTITUTION MATTERS/CONTPROB/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10 D/CTS: 2/SWAPD: 01-17-19/PF390 18/VF2:150/FOP1: 3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT WILL REPORT TO COLLECTION ON OR BEFORE 01-17-19 AND THE LATE FEE SHALL NOT BE IMPOSED/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORTTO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT: 05-14-19/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU: IF COUNSEL IS AUTHORIZED TO ACT ON HIS BEHALF/
/CAL ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/MVARS/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED UNLESS DISPO/
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPOSE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:  2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 10/TRANS 10:FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
